heroSubtitles: World-class cardiac and vascular care with outcomes that redefine what's possible
Transparent, ethical care — every decision grounded in evidence and respect for life
Beyond medicine — we are partners in your healing journey, every step of the way

services.title: Comprehensive Specialties Under One Roof
services.subtitle: From routine care to the most complex procedures — our 50+ specialties serve every dimension of your health.

features.title: Expert Doctors
features.desc: 1,500+ super-specialists with global training and decades of combined experience across 50+ disciplines.

features.title: Advanced Technology
features.desc: da Vinci robotic systems, 3T MRI, hybrid cath labs, CyberKnife — among the first in the region.

features.title: Patient-Centric Care
features.desc: Multidisciplinary tumor boards, personalized care plans, and a dedicated patient advocate for every admission.

features.title: World-Class Infrastructure
features.desc: 1,000-bed hospital, 250-bed ICU, 30+ operating theatres, and HEPA-filtered isolation suites.

international.title: Healing Across Borders
international.desc: Patients from 80+ countries trust MediCare for complex procedures at a fraction of Western costs — with quality outcomes that match the world's finest hospitals.
serviceDescs: Medical visa invitation letters and embassy documentation within 24 hours.
Airport pickup, hotel coordination, and seamless logistics across your entire visit.
Professional medical interpreters in 40+ languages available round the clock.
Partnered accommodations at all budget levels within 1km of the hospital.

app.title: Your Health, At Your Fingertips
app.desc: Book appointments, view test results, consult with doctors via video, manage prescriptions, and access your complete health records — all from one secure app.

about.title: A Decade of Excellence, A Legacy of Care
about.subtitle: Founded in 2010, MediCare Excellence Hospital has grown from a 200-bed facility to one of the region's most trusted multispecialty hospitals, touching over 12 million lives.

story.title: Built on a Belief That Every Life Matters

about.visionText: To be the most trusted healthcare institution in the world — where every patient receives the most advanced medical care with the deepest human compassion, regardless of their background or means.
about.missionText: To deliver exceptional, evidence-based healthcare with integrity, innovation, and compassion — empowering our patients with knowledge, our doctors with the best tools, and our community with better health.
